---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for MissionBrief
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What gap or pain point does this address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

What would you like MissionBrief to do?

## Source-backed check

Does this involve numbers or metrics? If so, how does it preserve the
**deterministic extraction + citation** guarantee (no LLM-invented figures)?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, if any.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or examples.
